header: Average Deck for Atraxa, Praetors' Voice - Budget

articles.excerpt: Does Atraxa, Praetors' Voice deserve her reputation of being one of the most powerful commanders in the game?

articles.value: Y'shtola Becomes #4 Most Popular Commander, Bumping Krenko
articles.excerpt: Y'shtola has bumped Krenko, Mob Boss to #5. Let's examine where Y'shtola is now, where she may be headed, and who she's up against!
Infect was a dominating force in Legacy for a time, but is that raw power able to make an impact in Commander? Let's see!

articles.value: Cocktail Hour for the Top 10 Commanders, With mtgdemonictutor
articles.excerpt: Like to have cocktails while you play Commander? Then check out these cocktails created for the top 10 commanders on EDHREC.

articles.value: Adding Compleatly New Cards for Atraxa Decks
articles.excerpt: Got an old Atraxa deck gathering dust? Spruce her up with some of these great new cards that have come out in the last two years.
